summary: Frontend bug fix verified: Adding recipe to meal planner from 'Cook with Your Stock' section now updates UI immediately without page refresh. The fix correctly passes addMealPlan from useMealPlanner hook to AddToPlannerModal component.
passed_tests: Planner page loads with PersonalizedRecipeStream component visible
Cook with Your Stock section displays 17 recipe videos from favorite channels
Add to Plan button opens AddToPlannerModal correctly
Modal shows day selector, meal slot selector, serving size, and ingredient reservation options
Selecting Wednesday + Lunch slot updates modal submit button text to 'Add to Lunch Plan'
Submitting the form adds recipe to meal planner
Success toast appears immediately: 'Recipe added to planner!'
Recipe card in feed immediately shows 'Planned for Wed' badge (no page refresh needed)
Calendar view shows the meal in Wednesday's Lunch slot immediately
Meal card displays video thumbnail, title, ingredients (Rice, Cumin Seeds), and '1 items reserved'
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix correctly implemented: PersonalizedRecipeStream imports useMealPlanner hook (line 8) and passes addMealPlan to AddToPlannerModal (line 352)
AddToPlannerModal correctly uses addMealPlan prop when available (lines 118-126), falling back to direct axios call for backwards compatibility
State management via useMealPlanner hook ensures immediate UI updates across components sharing the same state
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test user and recipes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for immediate meal planner update from PersonalizedRecipeStream verified. The app has short session timeouts - login may expire between test steps. Test user recipe_tester@test.com has active household 'Test Recipe Household' with inventory items (Rice, Wheat Flour, Turmeric Powder, Cumin Seeds, etc.) and favorite channels (Hebbars Kitchen, madhurasrecipe, papa mummy, Anju's Kitchen).

bug_verification.original_issue: When adding recipe from 'Cook with Your Stock' section, planner did not update immediately - required page refresh
bug_verification.root_cause: AddToPlannerModal was using direct axios.post instead of addMealPlan from useMealPlanner hook, so state wasn't shared
bug_verification.fix_applied: PersonalizedRecipeStream now imports useMealPlanner and passes addMealPlan to AddToPlannerModal
bug_verification.verification_result: PASSED - Recipe added from Cook with Your Stock section now shows 'Planned' badge immediately and appears in calendar without refresh
